Title: Milestone Date Details: Large Container
Name: sn-layout-container / Milestone Date Details: Large Container (EjEmKN)
SheetName:
='Milestone Date Details'
&
' '&
If('$(vMilestoneDateType)' = 'Range',

If('$(vMilestoneDateRange)'='MTD',
'($(=Year(Date(RangeMin(MakeDate(SubField(vSetDate,'-',1),Num(Month(Date#(SubField(vSetDate,'-',-1),'MMM')))),Max([CommonDate]))))&'-'&Month(Date(RangeMin(MakeDate(SubField(vSetDate,'-',1),Num(Month(Date#(SubField(vSetDate,'-',-1),'MMM')))),Max([CommonDate]))))))'

,
If('$(vMilestoneDateRange)'='Last Month',
'($(=Year(Date(RangeMin(AddMonths(MakeDate(SubField(vSetDate,'-',1),Num(Month(Date#(SubField(vSetDate,'-',-1),'MMM')))),-1),Max([CommonDate]))))&'-'&Month(Date(RangeMin(AddMonths(MakeDate(SubField(vSetDate,'-',1),Num(Month(Date#(SubField(vSetDate,'-',-1),'MMM')))),-1),Max([CommonDate]))))))'
,
If('$(vMilestoneDateRange)'='QTD',
'$(=Year(Date(RangeMin(MakeDate(SubField(vSetDate,'-',1),Num(Month(Date#(SubField(vSetDate,'-',-1),'MMM')))),Max([CommonDate]))))) '&'Quarter $(=Num(Ceil(Num(Month(Date(RangeMin(MakeDate(SubField(vSetDate,'-',1),Num(Month(Date#(SubField(vSetDate,'-',-1),'MMM')))),Max([CommonDate])))))/3)))'
,
If('$(vMilestoneDateRange)'='Last Quarter',
'$(=Year(Date(RangeMin(AddMonths(MakeDate(SubField(vSetDate,'-',1),Num(Month(Date#(SubField(vSetDate,'-',-1),'MMM')))),-3),Max([CommonDate]))))) '&'Quarter $(=Num(Ceil(Num(Month(Date(RangeMin(AddMonths(MakeDate(SubField(vSetDate,'-',1),Num(Month(Date#(SubField(vSetDate,'-',-1),'MMM')))),-3),Max([CommonDate])))))/3)))'
,
If('$(vMilestoneDateRange)'='YTD',
'$(=Year(Date(RangeMin(MakeDate(SubField(vSetDate,'-',1),Num(Month(Date#(SubField(vSetDate,'-',-1),'MMM')))),Max([CommonDate])))))'

,
If('$(vMilestoneDateRange)'='Last Year',
'$(=Year(Date(RangeMin(AddYears(MakeDate(SubField(vSetDate,'-',1),Num(Month(Date#(SubField(vSetDate,'-',-1),'MMM')))),-1),Max([CommonDate])))))'
))))))
,
'($(=Date(RangeMax(Num(AddMonths(MonthStart(MakeDate(SubField(vSetDate,'-',1),Num(Month(Date#(SubField(vSetDate,'-',-1),'MMM'))))),-12)),Min([CommonDate]))))'
&' To '&
'$(=Date(RangeMin(RangeMin(Num(MonthEnd(MakeDate(SubField(vSetDate,'-',1),Num(Month(Date#(SubField(vSetDate,'-',-1),'MMM')))))),$(vCurrentDate)),Max([CommonDate]))))'
&')'
)
